message:
fix(session_store): heal missing-newline frames instead of truncating segment data

Previously, a valid frame missing its trailing newline caused the entire
segment and all subsequent segments to be deleted, discarding valid data.
Now the missing newline is appended in-place and the frame is preserved.

Additionally, mid-file parse errors that are not EOF-trailing-newline
truncations are promoted to hard errors via Error::session() instead of
being silently tolerated, catching genuine corruption earlier.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
